description: Fetches and computes the Aave V3 health factor for any wallet using Chainlink Price Feeds, returning a full risk report on demand.
detailedDescription: On-demand risk assessment for Aave V3 positions. Pass a wallet address and receive the computed health factor (HF = weighted collateral / total debt), risk level (safe / warning / critical / liquidatable), per-asset collateral and debt breakdown, Chainlink-verified prices, and a concrete repay or add-collateral recommendation — all in a single call. AI agents (e.g. OpenClaw) can invoke this via x402 at $0.05 USDC per query. In production, prices are sourced from live Chainlink AggregatorV3Interface contracts on-chain; local-simulation uses a sample dataset mirroring Aave V3 Ethereum mainnet parameters.

inputs.name: walletAddress
inputs.description: Ethereum wallet address of the Aave position holder to monitor.

inputs.name: alertThreshold
inputs.description: HF below which a 'warning' is raised. Defaults to '1.2'.

inputs.name: criticalThreshold
inputs.description: HF below which a 'critical' alert is raised. Defaults to '1.05'.

outputs.name: healthFactor
outputs.description: Computed Aave V3 health factor (HF = weighted collateral / total debt).

outputs.name: collateralUsd
outputs.description: Total collateral value in USD at current Chainlink prices.

outputs.name: debtUsd
outputs.description: Total debt value in USD at current Chainlink prices.

outputs.name: recommendation
outputs.description: Specific action: repay amount, add collateral, or 'position healthy'.

outputs.name: positions
outputs.description: Per-asset breakdown of collateral and debt with USD values.

outputs.name: pricesUsed
outputs.description: Asset prices used in the calculation, sourced from Chainlink feeds.

outputs.name: timestamp
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the assessment was performed.
